name: Stuffed Onions Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the papery outer layers of the onion skin.
2. Slice off the ends of each onion and cut from top to bottom through the center.
3. Cook the onions in a kettle of boiling water until just soft, then drain immediately and let cool.
4. Mix rice, ground meat, allspice, and oil in a bowl. Add more oil if needed to hold the mixture together.
5. Stuff each layer of the cooled onions with a large spoonful of the mixture, rolling them up.
6. Place the rolled onion layers side by side, rolled side down, in a flat dish.
7. Blend the beef bouillon cubes, lemon juice, and boiling water until the cubes are melted.
8. Pour the blended mixture over the stuffed onions.
9. Sprinkle with grenadine if desired.
10. Cook, covered, on medium heat for 1 hour.
